p1_critical_issues.title: [Bug] v1.9.7 Windows x64 portable ships ARM64 native module (registry.node), breaking OpenClaw entirely
p1_critical_issues.priority_signal: Ships-broken: ARM64 native module in x64 portable → ERR_DLOPEN_FAILED → MemoryService crash → OpenClaw UI broken for all Windows x64 portable users on v1.9.7

security_issues.title: [Bug]: MCP OAuth callback accepts first code without state validation
